candidates.title: Vinyl Shop Branding Sticker Design
candidates.tools: Illustrator — for print-ready CMYK output and scalable vector artwork
candidates.brief: I’m refreshing my store’s look and need a set of eye-catching vinyl stickers that will carry our branding consistently across glass doors, counters, product displays, and even the exterior façade. Because these decals must perform both indoors and out, durability and colour fidelity matter just as much as great design. Here’s what I’m after: a creative concept that reflects our current logo palette, scalable layouts for several sizes (small shelf labels up to large window pieces), and print-ready artwork optimised for high-tack, weather-resistant vinyl. If you routinely prep files for digital printing—complete with bleed, trim marks and cut lines—you’ll feel right at home on this project. Deliverables should include: • Two initial design directions with room for feedback • Final vector artwork (AI/SVG) and a press-ready PDF for each approved size • A simple usage sheet showing placement

candidates.title: Logo Redesign for Cabinet Installation & Remodeling Company
candidates.brief: Upwork · Fixed price About the project I am looking for a professional designer to redesign and modernize the existing logo for my company, Phoenix Remodel LLC. My business specializes in cabinet installation, furniture assembly, furniture repair, trim work, carpentry, and residential remodeling services. The goal is to create a modern, clean, professional, and memorable logo while maintaining a strong connection to the construction and remodeling industry. Requirements: * Redesign or modernize the current logo * Minimalist and professional style * Easy to recognize and readable at both small and large sizes * Suitable for website, social media, uniforms, vehicle graphics, business cards, stickers, and printed materials * Must look good in both color and monochrome versions Color versions required: 1. Orange logo on black background 2. White logo on black background 3. Black logo on whit

candidates.title: Graphic Designer Needed to Convert AI Apparel Concepts into Print-on-Demand Production Artwork
candidates.brief: Upwork · Fixed price **ABOUT THE PROJECT** I own a small ecommerce apparel and lifestyle brand called Freedom Porch. Over the past several months, I have created a collection of product concepts using AI-generated mockups. The concepts, messaging, and overall creative direction are already established. I am looking for an experienced graphic designer to transform these concepts into clean, professional, production-ready artwork suitable for Printful, Printify, Shopify, TikTok Shop, and other print-on-demand platforms. This is not a concept-generation project. The concepts already exist. The primary work is recreating and refining the artwork so it meets professional print standards. **SCOPE OF WORK** Current project includes: **APPAREL** 13 unique shirt designs Several shirt designs require 2–3 color variations for different garment colors (for example, white artwork on a navy shirt and

candidates.title: Logo Redesign for Christian Mission Part 2
candidates.brief: We are seeking a skilled designer to redraw our logo for a Christian Mission. The logo should be simple, yet distinctive, and convey the mission's values and message. The design should be versatile for use on various platforms, including print and digital media. The ideal candidate will have experience in logo design and be able to follow specific guidelines to ensure the logo aligns with the mission's vision. Logo Pack Components & Usage Guide To maintain consistency for The Sword & Trowel, here is how to structure your files: A1 (Master Vector - Full Color): Use this for all primary digital branding, website headers, and large-format print (signage). Requirements: Export as .ai (source), .svg (web-scalable), and .png (high-res with transparency). candidates.title: Logo and Brand Identity Designer
candidates.brief: Upwork · Fixed price About United Auto Film (UAF) supplies paint protection film (PPF), window tint, and related products. We're rebranding and need a designer to deliver a complete logo and identity system that works on digital channels and physical packaging (boxes, labels, stickers). Visual Direction Premium, modern, performance-automotive. Minimalist and confident. Not flashy, not factory-catalog, not "tuner." References (visual feel, not to copy): CARPRO (https://carpro.global/) — primary tone reference. Refined typography, strong master + sub-brand naming (CARPRO → IMMORTAL → Gloss/Black/Matte/Carbon), premium product packaging. KKVinyl (https://kkvinyl-usa.com/) — black/white discipline and master + sub-brand structure. UPTF (https://www.uptf.net/) — bold custom wordmark with angled letterforms, deep blue accent, cinematic photography. Not this: mascots, vintage badges, heavy grad
